description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Make CI (MSYS2 for Windows) that runs on every push to all branches and on pull requests to all branches. Use a single windows-latest job with a matrix strategy that varies edition, compiler, and target. For each matrix combination, check out the repository to a path named main, install required packages using MSYS2, run a PowerShell script to build the project with specified edition, compiler, and target, and upload the resulting build artifacts.
